title: paepalanthus capillaceus f. prolifer
side_effects: Paepalanthus capillaceus f. prolifer can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps, as well as allergic reactions like skin rashes and itching. In severe cases, improper use of this plant can lead to more serious complications, including respiratory problems and cardiovascular issues. Some individuals may also experience dizziness, headaches, and fatigue when using Paepalanthus capillaceus f. prolifer without proper guidance. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
